Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. An Unsolicited Guide to Being a Researcher [pdf] 46 upvotes, 4 comments
  2. Can you get root with only a cigarette lighter? (2024) 129 upvotes, 20 comments
  3. POSSE – Publish on your Own Site, Syndicate Elsewhere 301 upvotes, 65 comments
  4. Dataframe 1.0.0.0 81 upvotes, 16 comments
  5. The gold standard of optimization: A look under the hood of RollerCoaster Tycoon 473 upvotes, 131 comments
  6. GrapheneOS will remain usable by anyone without requiring personal information 530 upvotes, 150 comments
  7. Flash-MoE: Running a 397B Parameter Model on a Laptop 373 upvotes, 118 comments
  8. Project Nomad – Knowledge That Never Goes Offline 521 upvotes, 190 comments
  9. The way CTRL-C in Postgres CLI cancels queries is incredibly hack-y 105 upvotes, 31 comments
  10. The LCA problem revisited [pdf] 28 upvotes, 5 comments
  11. PC Gamer recommends RSS readers in a 37mb article that just keeps downloading 725 upvotes, 339 comments
  12. Study: 'Security Fatigue' May Weaken Digital Defenses 11 upvotes, 1 comments
  13. Bombadil: Property-based testing for web UIs by Antithesis 121 upvotes, 48 comments
  14. iPhone 17 Pro Demonstrated Running a 400B LLM 34 upvotes, 11 comments
  15. The future of version control 589 upvotes, 330 comments
  16. GitHub appears to be struggling with measly three nines availability 264 upvotes, 138 comments
  17. Nanopositioning Metrology, Gödel, and Bootstraps 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  18. Reports of code's death are greatly exaggerated 500 upvotes, 350 comments
  19. Why I love NixOS 383 upvotes, 263 comments
  20. Walmart: ChatGPT checkout converted 3x worse than website 225 upvotes, 167 comments
  21. Show HN: The King Wen Permutation: [52, 10, 2] 40 upvotes, 23 comments
  22. Migrating to the EU 542 upvotes, 458 comments
  23. Tin Can, a 'landline' for kids 232 upvotes, 197 comments
  24. Fear and Fragility: The Glass Delusion and Its History 8 upvotes, 2 comments
  25. If Dspy is so great, why isn't anyone using it? 32 upvotes, 21 comments
  26. Attractive students no longer receive better results as classes moved online 276 upvotes, 264 comments
  27. You are not your job 290 upvotes, 317 comments
  28. Cyberattack on vehicle breathalyzer company leaves drivers stranded in the US 60 upvotes, 54 comments
  29. What young workers are doing to AI-proof themselves 191 upvotes, 298 comments
  30. GoGoGrandparent (YC S16) is hiring Back end Engineers 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 11:30pm, 23 March 2026. Source here.
